lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਖਿ ਤਾ ਕੋ ਜਸੁ ਰਸਨ ਬਖਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: mukh taa ko jas rasan bakhaanai |
lines.english: with your mouth and with your tongue, chant His Praises.
By His Grace, you remain in the Dharma;
O mind, meditate continually on the Supreme Lord God.
O Nanak, you shall return to your true home with honor. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜੀ ਜਪਤ ਦਰਗਹ ਮਾਨੁ ਪਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: prabh jee japat daragah maan paaveh |
lines.english: Meditating on God, you shall be honored in His Court;
By His Grace, your honor is preserved;

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਕਹਤ ॥
lines.translit: man sukh paaveh har har jas kehat |
lines.english: O mind, chant the Praises of the Lord, Har, Har, and find peace.
attune yourself to that Loving Lord.
By His Grace, you have a healthy, golden body;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਤੇਰੇ ਸਗਲ ਛਿਦ੍ਰ ਢਾਕੇ ॥
lines.translit: jih prasaad tere sagal chhidr dtaake |
lines.english: By His Grace, all your deficits are covered;

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਸਰਨੀ ਪਰੁ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤਾ ਕੈ ॥
lines.translit: man saranee par tthaakur prabh taa kai |
lines.english: O mind, seek the Sanctuary of God, our Lord and Master.
By His Grace, you obtained this precious human body;

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਿਮਰਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਊਚੇ ॥
lines.translit: man saas saas simarahu prabh aooche |
lines.english: O mind, with each and every breath, remember God on High.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਤੁਝੁ ਕੋ ਨ ਪਹੂਚੈ ॥
lines.translit: jih prasaad tujh ko na pahoochai |
lines.english: By His Grace, no one can rival you;
By His Grace, you wear decorations;

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਕਿਉ ਆਲਸੁ ਕੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: man tis simarat kiau aalas keejai |
lines.english: O mind, why are you so lazy? Why don't you remember Him in meditation?
O Nanak, worship Him with devotion. ||3||
By His Grace, you have horses and elephants to ride;

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਤਿਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਉ ਕਬਹੂ ਨ ਬਿਸਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: man tis prabh kau kabahoo na bisaaree |
lines.english: O mind, never forget that God.
By His Grace, you have land, gardens and wealth;
keep God enshrined in your heart.
standing up and sitting down, meditate always on Him.
O mind, the One who formed your form
Meditate on Him - the One Invisible Lord;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਪੁੰਨ ਬਹੁ ਦਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: jih prasaad kareh pun bahu daan |
lines.english: By His Grace, you give donations in abundance to charities;
here and hereafter, O Nanak, He shall save you. ||4||
By His Grace, you perform religious rituals and worldly duties;

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਉ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਚਿਤਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: tis prabh kau saas saas chitaaree |
lines.english: think of God with each and every breath.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਕਰਿ ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਧਿਆਨ ॥
lines.translit: man aatth pehar kar tis kaa dhiaan |
lines.english: O mind, meditate on Him, twenty-four hours a day.
By His Grace, your form is so beautiful;
constantly remember God, the Incomparably Beautiful One.
By His Grace, you have such high social status;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਦਾ ਦਿਨ ਰਾਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: so prabh simar sadaa din raat |
lines.english: remember God always, day and night.
By His Grace, you listen to the sound current of the Naad.
By His Grace, your honor is preserved;
by Guru's Grace, O Nanak, chant His Praises. ||5||
By His Grace, you behold amazing wonders.
By His Grace, you abide in peace and ease.
By His Grace, you speak ambrosial words with your tongue.
By His Grace, you are completely fulfilled.
By His Grace, you obtain the supreme status.
By His Grace, your hands move and work.
By Guru's Grace, O Nanak, awaken your mind! ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਅਵਰ ਕਤ ਲਾਗਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: aisaa prabh tiaag avar kat laagahu |
lines.english: Why forsake God, and attach yourself to another?
By His Grace, you are absorbed into celestial peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਉ ਮੂਲਿ ਨ ਮਨਹੁ ਬਿਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: tis prabh kau mool na manahu bisaar |
lines.english: never forget God from your mind.
By His Grace, you are famous all over the world;
By His Grace, you have prestige;

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਮਨ ਮੂੜ ਤੂ ਤਾ ਕਉ ਜਾਪੁ ॥
lines.translit: re man moorr too taa kau jaap |
lines.english: O foolish mind, meditate on Him!
By His Grace, your works are completed;
O mind, know Him to be close at hand.
By His Grace, you find the Truth;

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਤੂੰ ਤਾ ਸਿਉ ਰਾਚੁ ॥
lines.translit: re man mere toon taa siau raach |
lines.english: O my mind, merge yourself into Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਸਭ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jih prasaad sabh kee gat hoe |
lines.english: By His Grace, everyone is saved;

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਗਾਵਾਏ ਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aap gaavaae su har gun gaau |
lines.english: Those, whom He inspires to sing, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.
Those, whom He inspires to chant, chant His Name.
O Nanak, meditate, and chant His Chant. ||7||
